pr.title: feat: Agent Skill System Phase 4 Materialization

comments.body:
![high](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/high-priority.svg)

The `agent_skill.materialize` activity is missing from the activity catalog. Since this PR focuses on Phase 4 (Materialization), this activity must be registered so that Temporal workers can host it.

```python
        TemporalActivityDefinition(
            activity_type="agent_skill.resolve",
            family="agent_skill",
            capability_class="artifacts",
            task_queue=cfg.activity_artifacts_task_queue,
            fleet=ARTIFACTS_FLEET,
            timeouts=TemporalActivityTimeouts(60, 120),
            retries=_activity_retries(max_attempts=3, max_interval_seconds=30),
        ),
        TemporalActivityDefinition(
            activity_type="agent_skill.build_prompt_index",
            family="agent_skill",
            capability_class="artifacts",
            task_queue=cfg.activity_artifacts_task_queue,
            fleet=ARTIFACTS_FLEET,
            timeouts=TemporalActivityTimeouts(60, 120),
            retries=_activity_retries(max_attempts=3, max_interval_seconds=30),
        ),
        TemporalActivityDefinition(
            activity_type="agent_skill.materialize",
            family="agent_skill",
            capability_class="artifacts",
            task_queue=cfg.activity_artifacts_task_queue,
            fleet=ARTIFACTS_FLEET,
            timeouts=TemporalActivityTimeouts(60, 120),
            retries=_activity_retries(max_attempts=3, max_interval_seconds=30),
        ),
```

![high](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/high-priority.svg)

The `agent_skill.materialize` activity is missing from the `TemporalActivityBinding` map. It needs to be bound to its implementation in `AgentSkillsActivities`.

```python
    "agent_skill.resolve": ("agent_skills", "resolve_skills"),
    "agent_skill.build_prompt_index": ("agent_skills", "build_prompt_index"),
    "agent_skill.materialize": ("agent_skills", "materialize"),
```

![high](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/high-priority.svg)

The loop for materializing individual skills is currently empty. While the directory structure and manifest are created, the actual skill content (e.g., from `content_ref`) is not fetched or written to the workspace. This means agents will only see the manifest file but no actual skill instructions, which contradicts the Phase 4 goal of materializing the active snapshot for runtime consumption.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

Failure to write the `active_manifest.json` should be treated as a fatal error for the materialization process. Currently, it only logs a warning and proceeds, which could lead to agents operating with an incomplete or missing skill set configuration.

```suggestion
            except OSError as ex:
                raise RuntimeError(f"AgentSkillMaterializer failed to write active_manifest.json: {ex}") from ex
```

## Code Review

This pull request implements Phase 4 of the Agent Skill System, introducing the core infrastructure for skill resolution and materialization. Key additions include Pydantic schemas for skill snapshots, a resolution service with precedence-based merging, and a materialization service that projects active skills into a run-scoped directory. The changes also integrate these services into Temporal activities and the agent runtime launcher. Feedback identifies that the agent_skill.materialize activity is missing from the catalog and bindings, and the materialization logic currently lacks actual content fetching. Additionally, improvements are suggested for error handling during manifest creation and ensuring idempotency when managing symlinks in the launcher.

`AgentSkillsActivities` defines an `agent_skill.materialize` activity, but this runtime binding table does not include it. As a result, `build_activity_bindings()` will raise “no runtime binding metadata” if `agent_skill.materialize` is ever added to the catalog or invoked. Add a `_ACTIVITY_HANDLER_ATTRS` entry mapping `agent_skill.materialize` to the `agent_skills` implementation (e.g., `materialize`).
```suggestion
    "agent_skill.resolve": ("agent_skills", "resolve_skills"),
    "agent_skill.materialize": ("agent_skills", "materialize"),
```

The activity catalog adds `agent_skill.resolve` and `agent_skill.build_prompt_index` but omits `agent_skill.materialize`, even though `AgentSkillsActivities` implements it and repository docs list it as a core activity. This will prevent workers from hosting materialization via the catalog/topology system; add a `TemporalActivityDefinition` for `agent_skill.materialize` with the intended fleet/task queue (docs suggest routing to the agent-runtime/prep fleet).

This projection replaces `.agents/skills` with a symlink to `skills_active` by renaming the existing `.agents/skills` directory. That breaks the documented invariant that `.agents/skills/local` remains available as the local-only overlay path (it gets moved under `skills_repo_source/local`). Consider preserving `.agents/skills` as a real directory and linking/mounting the active projection inside it (or explicitly re-expose `local` under the canonical path) and make the rename target idempotent (handle pre-existing `.agents/skills_repo_source`).
```suggestion
                workspace_agents_dir = Path(resolved_workspace_path) / ".agents"
                target_skills_dir = workspace_agents_dir / "skills"
                active_link = target_skills_dir / "active"
                try:
                    # Ensure .agents/skills exists as a real directory so that
                    # the local-only overlay at .agents/skills/local remains
                    # available at its canonical path.
                    if target_skills_dir.exists():
                        if target_skills_dir.is_symlink():
                            # Avoid clobbering unexpected setups where skills is already a symlink.
                            logger.warning(
                                "Expected .agents/skills to be a directory, but found a symlink at %s; "
                                "skipping active skills linkage.",
                                target_skills_dir,
                            )
                            raise OSError("Cannot link active skills into symlinked .agents/skills")
                    else:
                        target_skills_dir.mkdir(parents=True)

                    # Link the active skills projection inside .agents/skills without
                    # replacing the directory itself. This preserves .agents/skills/local.
                    if active_link.exists():
                        # Idempotent: leave existing link or directory in place.
                        if not active_link.is_symlink():
                            logger.warning(
                                "Expected .agents/skills/active to be a symlink, but found %s; "
                                "leaving it unchanged.",
                                active_link,
                            )
                    else:
                        active_link.symlink_to(active_skills_dir, target_is_directory=True)
```

Phase 3 checklist marks artifact-backed outputs as completed (e.g., “Generate explicit `ResolvedSkillSet` artifacts”, “Generate prompt-index artifacts”, “Return compact refs…”), but the current implementation returns `ResolvedSkillSet` inline from `agent_skill.resolve` and `build_prompt_index` returns a raw string (no artifact writes / refs). Either implement the artifact creation/linking described here or revert these items back to unchecked so the plan matches the code.

Import block is likely to fail isort/ruff: standard-library imports (`datetime`, `unittest.mock`) should be grouped/sorted, and there are multiple separate imports from `moonmind.schemas.agent_skill_models` that isort will typically consolidate. Please reorder/group imports into a single isort-compliant block.

## Pull request overview Implements “Phase 4” scaffolding for the Agent Skill System by adding Temporal activities and services to (a) resolve skill selectors into a `ResolvedSkillSet` snapshot and (b) materialize an “active skills” projection into run workspaces, plus wiring these activities into the Temporal worker binding/catalog system and updating schemas/tests accordingly. **Changes:** - Add agent-skill schemas (`SkillSelector`, `ResolvedSkillSet`, `RuntimeSkillMaterialization`) and thread selector/ref fields through workflow + agent-runtime request contracts. - Introduce skill resolution + materialization services and Temporal activities (`agent_skill.resolve`, `agent_skill.build_prompt_index`, `agent_skill.materialize`), and wire new activity families into worker binding/catlog plumbing. - Add unit tests for resolution/materialization behavior and update Temporal worker binding tests to include the new activities implementation. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 22 out of 22 changed files in this pull request and generated 5 comments.

var/pr_comments/current-branch-comments.json | PR comment snapshot metadata update for the resolver tooling. | | artifacts/pr_resolver_addressed_comments.json | Tracks dispositions of prior review comments for automation. | | moonmind/schemas/agent_skill_models.py | Adds core Pydantic contracts/enums for selection, provenance, resolved snapshots, and materialization outputs. | | moonmind/schemas/workflow_models.py | Extends workflow run request schema to accept an optional `skills` selector payload. | | moonmind/schemas/agent_runtime_models.py | Adds `resolvedSkillsetRef` to agent execution requests with non-blank validation. | | moonmind/schemas/__init__.py | Re-exports new agent-skill schema types. | | moonmind/services/skill_resolution.py | Adds resolver + loader interfaces and a precedence-based merge implementation (currently loader stubs). | | moonmind/services/skill_materialization.py | Adds materializer that writes a run-scoped `.agents/skills_active` manifest and prompt-index ref behavior. | | moonmind/workflows/agent_skills/agent_skills_activities.py | Adds Temporal activities for resolving skills, building prompt index strings, and materializing to workspace. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/activity_runtime.py | Registers agent-skill activity types in the activity binding metadata and accepts an `agent_skills` implementation slot. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/activity_catalog.py | Adds catalog definitions for `agent_skill.resolve` and `agent_skill.build_prompt_index`. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/workers.py | Threads `agent_skills_activities` through worker binding builder API. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/worker_runtime.py | Wires `AgentSkillsActivities()` into runtime worker bootstrapping. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/runtime/launcher.py | Adds workspace symlink/rename logic to expose `.agents/skills_active` as `.agents/skills` for runtimes. | | tests/unit/workflows/temporal/test_temporal_workers.py | Updates worker binding tests to pass `AgentSkillsActivities()` for binding construction. | | tests/unit/workflows/agent_skills/test_agent_skills_activities.py | Adds unit tests for resolve/build_prompt_index/materialize activity behavior. | | tests/unit/services/test_skill_resolution.py | Adds unit tests for resolver behavior with loader stubbing and context gating. | | tests/unit/services/test_skill_materialization.py | Adds unit tests for `.agents/skills_active` output and prompt-bundled materialization behavior. | | docs/tmp/004-AgentSkillSystemPlan.md | Updates checklist status for Phase 2–4 items in the skill system plan. |
